Compliance.description: Part of Motus Holdings (JSE listed); fully licensed SA fleet; CPA/NCA compliant; no 2025/2026 violations found; comprehensive T&Cs.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.8/5 (43 reviews); Google SA branches mixed 3-4/5; TripAdvisor mixed; complaints on billing/car quality but some positives.

Product Value.description: Competitive pricing; good fleet variety; Privilege loyalty; promotions online; various packages for tourists/business.

Innovation.description: Mobile app; online booking; electric vehicles in fleet; one-way rentals; airport priority service.

Customer Support.description: Phone (0861 131 000), app, online chat. Mixed reviews: good for standard but disputes poorly handled.

Accessibility & Security.description: App available; national coverage; standard privacy practices; no specific POPIA issues found.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: From ~R300/day economy; online discounts; packages available

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed-negative on HelloPeter; some positive branch experiences; good for tourists.
